title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM TA (Trial Arms) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM TA (Trial Arms) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw trial arms data, (2) Derive USUBJID and TASEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: ARMCD, ARM, TAETORD, ETCD, ELEMENT, (4) Handle arm definition, element ordering within treatment arms, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 3 records.
